name: Chile and ginger vinaigrette
intro: This Asian-inspired dressing has a complex flavor; prepare a few hours ahead to allow the ginger and lemongrass to fully infuse. It is an excellent choice for noodle salads, such as the Mixed seafood salad.

ingredients.item: red chile, seeded and finely diced
x 1in (2.5cm) piece of fresh ginger, peeled and grated
lemongrass stalks, ends trimmed and outer leaves discarded
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Combine the vinegar, lime juice, and sugar in a small bowl. Add the oil in a steady stream and whisk until the mixture has emulsified.
Add the remaining ingredients, season to taste with salt and black pepper, and whisk to combine. Set aside for a few hours to develop the flavors.
Remove the lemongrass stalks just before serving. If the ingredients have separated, whisk again to re-emulsify.
